entity.summary: Indonesian centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by PT Indonesia Digital Exchange, providing IDR spot markets, limit-priced and instant buy/sell execution, deposits and withdrawals, portfolio services, and web and mobile access.
entity.notes: Current first-party About, homepage, and market pages support active CEX classification. The About page identifies PT Indonesia Digital Exchange and company establishment on 2018-08-14; this corporate establishment date is not used as an exact exchange launch date. Regulatory history is preserved in first-party history but the record does not overstate the current regulator relationship.

evidence.title: About digitalexchange.id
evidence.notes: Current first-party About page identifies digitalexchange.id as a crypto-asset buy/sell platform operated by PT Indonesia Digital Exchange, describes the company's 2018 establishment, user base, product mission, leadership, and corporate milestones.

evidence.title: digitalexchange.id trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes login and registration, buy/sell crypto functionality, portfolio management, IDR and crypto deposits and withdrawals, 24-hour transaction access, and maker/taker trading guidance.

evidence.title: digitalexchange.id Markets
evidence.notes: Current first-party market page exposes active IDR-denominated crypto markets with last price, percentage change, 24-hour high and low, and volume fields across a broad asset set.
